issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as authentication failures or missing parameters.

scenarios.name: rails-restful-controller
scenarios.rationale: Both produce RESTful controllers, but the treatment consistently combines before_action authentication, set_article, params.require.permit, includes(:author), and current_user.articles.build, while the baseline often omits one or two of these specific patterns.

scenarios.name: rails-actioncable-chat
scenarios.rationale: The treatment follows the exact ApplicationCable::Channel template with stream_from, receive(data), ActionCable.server.broadcast, and the routes mount, while the baseline often forgets the cable mount in routes or uses a less idiomatic broadcast call.
